title: [Task Sprint] QA Testing Report — Villume Admin

issues.main_description_html:
Epic 0 — Shared building blocks

SSR-safe Table-of-Contents scroll-spy directive for the legal pages (Terms, Privacy).

Scope

  • IntersectionObserver-based active-section highlighting in the sticky TOC.
  • SSR no-op (guard with isPlatformBrowser); links still work without JS.

Acceptance criteria

  • Active TOC item updates as the user scrolls; anchor links jump correctly; no SSR errors.

Testing scenario (QA)

  1. Scroll Terms/Privacy → the TOC highlights the section in view.
  2. Click a TOC item → page scrolls to that section.
  3. Disable JS → TOC links still navigate via anchors.
  4. View-source (SSR) → content present, no console errors on hydrate.

QA Tester Summary — Issue #1596: SSR-safe TOC scroll-spy directive

Suite: qa_testing/tests/e2e/legal/issue_1596_ssr_safe_toc_scroll_spy.spec.ts (Playwright · Chromium)
Env: Dev production https://dev.villume.com
Result: ❌ Failed — no-JS anchor fallback is not implemented

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given → Expected Matrix Result
1 White ssr_hydrate_terms_privacy Terms/Privacy opened from SSR → content + TOC present, no app runtime/pageerror TP ✅ Pass
2 Gray scroll_spy_terms_privacy User scrolls legal page → active TOC follows visible section TP ✅ Pass
3 Black toc_click_terms_privacy User clicks TOC item → page jumps to selected section and active state updates TP ✅ Pass
4 Black no_js_anchor_fallback JavaScript disabled → TOC link still uses hash anchor and navigates TP ❌ Fail
5 Task Sprint #1596 acceptance Scroll-spy + anchor click + SSR-safe + no-JS links TP ❌ Fail

Backend / SSR Response Code & Review

Request Status Code Content Check Review
GET /term-of-service 200 .villume-terms, data-toc, .legal-section present in SSR HTML ✅ Verified
GET /privacy-cookie-policy 200 .villume-privacy, data-toc, .legal-section present in SSR HTML ✅ Verified
Hydrated Terms page 200 8 TOC items and 8 legal sections visible ✅ Verified
Hydrated Privacy page 200 17 TOC items and 17 legal sections visible ✅ Verified

Code Review

Area File Finding Impact
Terms TOC fallback src/app/pages/service/service.component.html TOC links still use href="javascript:;" ❌ Fails no-JS anchor navigation
Privacy TOC fallback src/app/pages/privacy/privacy.component.html TOC links still use href="javascript:;" ❌ Fails no-JS anchor navigation
Runtime scroll-spy src/app/pages/service/service.component.ts, src/app/pages/privacy/privacy.component.ts IntersectionObserver active state works after hydration ✅ Verified
SSR guard src/app/pages/service/service.component.ts, src/app/pages/privacy/privacy.component.ts SSR content is present and no pageerror was observed during hydration ✅ Verified

Bug Notes

  • With JavaScript disabled, the Terms TOC item for section 7 renders as href="javascript:;"; expected href="#sec-7".
  • Because the link is not a real hash anchor, clicking it with JavaScript disabled keeps the URL at /term-of-service and does not jump to #sec-7.
  • Same implementation pattern exists on Privacy TOC links, so the no-JS fallback acceptance is not satisfied for both legal pages.
  • Dev environment emitted known external console noise from font/third-party services (font CORS, Gumlet/Sentry/Stripe/Google identity). No legal page pageerror was observed.

Evidence

  • Screenshots: Terms hydrated, Terms scroll-spy, Privacy TOC click, Terms no-JS fallback failure.
  • Video: Full desktop recording with browser address bar and 2-second action delay.

Screenshots

Privacy TOC click to section 12:

Terms no-JS anchor fallback failure:

Terms scroll-spy active section 5:

Terms SSR hydrated desktop:

Video Recording

issue-1596-legal-toc-address-bar.mp4

Epic C — Privacy (/privacy-cookie-policy)

Slice the Privacy page (reuses the shared legal layout, 17 sections).

Scope

  • Legal hero, sticky TOC (17 items), 17 numbered sections, data-rights callout, back-to-top.
  • Light + dark; responsive. Markup only.

Acceptance criteria

  • Matches Privacy.html in both themes, all breakpoints.

Testing scenario (QA)

  1. Compare to Privacy.html on desktop & mobile.
  2. Dark mode + mobile TOC correct.

Demo by Developer

QA Tester Summary - Issue #1616: Privacy page (/privacy-cookie-policy)

Suite: qa_testing/scripts/capture-issue-1616-full-screenshots.cjs and qa_testing/scripts/record-issue-1616-dev-flow.cjs (Playwright - Chromium headed + full-page screenshots + address-bar MP4)
Env: Development https://dev.villume.com/privacy-cookie-policy
Account: Guest flow; no login required.

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 Black privacy_page_loads open /privacy-cookie-policy -> Privacy page renders Desktop light Pass
2 Gray all_privacy_sections_visible desktop full-page capture -> all 17 Privacy Policy sections are visible Desktop light Pass
3 Gray desktop_dark_capture switch dark mode -> full Privacy Policy remains readable Desktop dark Pass
4 Black responsive_mobile emulate mobile viewport and capture full page -> Privacy page remains readable down to footer Mobile light + dark Pass
5 Gray toc_back_to_top click TOC item 12 and back-to-top -> section navigation and return-to-hero work Desktop light Pass
6 Evidence address_bar_video record headed Chrome desktop flow -> video shows browser window/address bar Desktop + mobile emulation Pass
7 Task Sprint #1616 acceptance legal hero, TOC, 17 sections, callout, responsive behavior, and address-bar video captured from dev TP Pass

Frontend Status & Review

Area Expected Actual Review
Source of truth Use the bug-free dev page Captured from https://dev.villume.com/privacy-cookie-policy Pass
Desktop layout Desktop viewport should keep TOC and document in legal layout Screenshot dimensions: 1440 x 7557 Pass
Privacy sections All 17 numbered sections visible Sections 1 through 17 appear in the long desktop screenshot Pass
Image shape Evidence should not be squashed or distorted Full-page screenshot preserves native desktop width and page height Pass
Responsive mobile Mobile viewport should stack and remain readable through the full page Full-page mobile screenshots captured at 390 x 13817; no horizontal overflow in runtime state Pass
Theme Light and dark desktop/mobile captures available Desktop and mobile screenshots captured Pass
TOC / back-to-top TOC click should scroll to selected section, and back-to-top should return to hero sec-12 became active, sec12Top: 81, then page returned to top with activeToc: sec-1 Pass
Address-bar video QA recording should show real browser chrome/address bar MP4 captured with desktop grab at 1920 x 1080, duration 31.46s Pass

Request Response Content-Type Review

Browser navigation to /privacy-cookie-policy Navigation succeeded DOM rendered .villume-privacy root, hero, TOC, legal document, callout, and back-to-top rendered.
Runtime DOM N/A DOM 17 TOC links and 17 .legal-section elements found.
TOC click sec-12 N/A UI interaction Section 12 reached viewport and TOC active state updated.

Code Review

File Review
src/app/routes/static.routes.ts Registers privacy-cookie-policy and lazy-loads PrivacyComponent.

Bug Notes

  • No blocking issue found on the dev Privacy page.
  • Screenshot evidence uses a desktop 1440 x 900 viewport with full-page capture output at 1440 x 7557, so the image is long-form desktop evidence, not a stretched or squashed resize.
  • Responsive mobile evidence uses a 390 x 844 viewport with full-page capture output at 390 x 13817, so the mobile content is captured down the page to the footer.
  • Address-bar evidence is an OS desktop recording, not Playwright's page-only video, so the browser address bar is included.

Type: Integration (wiring) · Epic: Password recovery

Connect the recovery flow end-to-end.

Scope: request → Email Sent confirmation; successful new-password submit → Password Reset confirmation; /resettoken handling; resend hookup.

Acceptance: full flow works (forgot → email sent → reset link → new password → reset success → log in); reset-token route resolves.

Depends on: Build "Email Sent", Build "Password Reset", Restyle Set-New-Password Form.

Part of the Settings & Password-Recovery redesign (Frontend).
Refs: docs/brainstorm/05-06-2026/ui-setting-email-password/plan.md · brainstorming.md

Demo by Developer

2026-06-11.17-05-26.mp4

QA Tester Summary - Issue #1656: [integration] Wire Password-Recovery Flow Navigation

Suite: qa_testing/tests/e2e/authentication/issue_1656_password_recovery_flow_navigation.spec.ts (Playwright - Chromium)
Env: Development https://dev.villume.com
Account: testergothru@gmail.com (real reset/login validation)

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 White recovery_ui_available guest opens login -> forgot-password modal, email field, captcha slot, confirmation, reset form, success state are visible TP Pass
2 Gray forgot_to_email_sent_and_resend valid email + captcha -> forgot API called, "Check your inbox" shown, Try again resubmits through same hookup TP Pass
3 Gray resettoken_to_new_password_success /resettoken?code=...&token=... -> /reset-password, PATCH password request uses bearer token, success screen appears TP Pass
4 Black continue_to_login_after_reset user clicks Continue to log in after success -> login dialog opens TP Pass
5 Black mobile_dark_responsive reset flow on 390px dark viewport -> form remains usable with no horizontal overflow TN Pass
6 Task Sprint #1656 acceptance forgot -> email sent -> reset link -> new password -> reset success -> log in TP Pass

Frontend Status & Review

Area Review Status
Forgot-password navigation Login dialog opens forgot-password modal correctly; email input and Send reset link action are available after captcha callback. Pass
Email Sent confirmation Successful forgot request shows Check your inbox and keeps the submitted email visible for user confirmation. Pass
Resend hookup Try again returns to request form and the second submit calls the forgot-password endpoint again. Pass
Reset-token handling /resettoken reads code and token, stores reset context, then navigates into /reset-password. Pass
New password flow Password strength/match validation enables submit; success state displays Password updated. Pass
Login handoff Continue to log in opens the login modal after reset success. Pass
Responsive Mobile dark viewport validated; no horizontal overflow detected. Pass

Response Code & Review

Flow Endpoint / Route Method Status Review
Mocked forgot request https://app2-dev.villume.com/v1/auth/password/forgot POST 200 Verified twice: initial submit and Try again resend path. Payload includes email and captcha token.
Mocked password reset https://app2-dev.villume.com/v1/auth/password PATCH 200 Verified request body includes code, new_password, confirm_password; Authorization: Bearer <reset-token> header is sent.
Real reset link resolution https://dev.villume.com/resettoken?... GET route UI success User-supplied inbox reset link resolved into /reset-password; password reset completed successfully with real token during manual validation.
Real login after reset https://app2-dev.villume.com/v1/auth POST 200 Verified on 2026-06-26: login succeeds with reset password and redirects to https://dev.villume.com/testergothru.

Code Review

File Review Status
src/app/routes/auth.routes.ts Auth routes include forgot-password, reset-password, and resettoken lazy-loaded pages. Pass
src/app/pages/reset-password/reset-token/reset-token.component.ts Reads code and token from query params and navigates to reset-password route for the form flow. Pass
src/app/pages/reset-password/reset-password.service.ts Sends reset request to /v1/auth/password with bearer reset token and matching password fields. Pass
src/app/layouts/forgot-password-modal/forgot-password-modal.component.html Provides forgot form, email sent state, and Try again path used by the recovery modal. Pass
qa_testing/tests/e2e/authentication/issue_1656_password_recovery_flow_navigation.spec.ts Added regression coverage for forgot request, resend, token route, reset submit, login handoff, and mobile dark responsive state. Pass

Evidence

Type File Review
Screenshot qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1656-password-recovery-email-sent.png Email Sent confirmation after forgot request.
Screenshot qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1656-password-recovery-reset-form.png Reset form after /resettoken route resolves.
Screenshot qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1656-password-recovery-password-updated.png Password Reset success confirmation.
Screenshot qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1656-password-recovery-login-dialog.png Continue-to-login handoff.
Screenshot qa_testing/reports/screenshots/issue-1656-password-recovery-mobile-dark.png Mobile dark responsive validation.
Video qa_testing/reports/videos/issue-1656-password-recovery-address-bar.mp4 Full desktop recording with browser address bar visible.

Bug Notes

  • No blocker found for Issue #1656 acceptance criteria.
  • Automated real forgot-email submit was blocked by production reCAPTCHA in the headed browser; the user supplied the inbox reset link, and that real token was validated through reset success and real login.
  • Mocked API coverage is intentionally kept for repeatable frontend integration checks; real backend validation was added for reset-token/password/login proof.

Type: Slicing (frontend build) · Epic: Password recovery

Build the full-page Password reset success confirmation reusing .confirm.

Scope: eyebrow "All set", H1 "Password reset", lede, Log in now CTA (opens login modal).

Decision: drop the "signed you out of all other devices" line unless backend actually invalidates other sessions.

Acceptance: reuses .confirm; Log in now opens the login modal; dark mode + responsive.

Part of the Settings & Password-Recovery redesign (Frontend).
Refs: docs/brainstorm/05-06-2026/ui-setting-email-password/plan.md · brainstorming.md

Demo by Developer

2026-06-11.17-05-26.mp4

QA Tester Summary - Issue #1651: [slicing] Build "Password Reset" Success Page

Suite: qa_testing/tests/e2e/authentication/issue_1651_password_reset_success_page_slicing.spec.ts (Playwright - Chromium)
Env: Development https://dev.villume.com
Scope Note: .confirm and exact copy (All set, Password reset, Log in now) were not used as blockers because dev implementation uses the current password-recovery success layout. QA focused on the task objective: success confirmation layout precision, CTA behavior, dark mode, and responsive safety.

Test Scenario & Result

# Box Scenario Given -> Expected Matrix Result
1 White success_confirmation_layout successful reset -> success confirmation is visible, readable, not collapsed/gepeng, no overlapping title/description/CTA TP Pass
2 Gray login_cta_handoff success CTA clicked -> login modal opens TP Pass
3 Black signed_out_copy_removed success page shown -> "signed you out of all other devices" copy is not displayed TN Pass
4 Black mobile_dark_responsive success page on mobile dark viewport -> no horizontal overflow and layout remains readable TN Pass
5 Task Sprint #1651 slicing objective password reset success page -> visual layout safe, CTA works, dark mode + responsive safe TP + TN Pass

Frontend Status & Review

Area Review Status
Success confirmation Success state renders after reset submit with visible icon, title, lede, and CTA. Pass
Layout precision Desktop and mobile captures show content is not flattened/gepeng, not clipped, and not overlapping. Pass
CTA behavior Success CTA opens the login modal. Pass
Removed session-copy decision The "signed you out of all other devices" line is not present. Pass
Dark mode Desktop dark and mobile dark screenshots render safely. Pass
Responsive Mobile full-page screenshots render vertical content correctly with no horizontal overflow. Pass

Response Code & Review

Flow Endpoint / Route Method Status Review
Reset token route https://dev.villume.com/resettoken?code=1651&token=qa-reset-token-1651 GET route UI success Route resolves to /reset-password and allows success state validation.
Mocked reset submit https://app2-dev.villume.com/v1/auth/password PATCH 200 Mocked only to enter the success screen repeatedly for slicing evidence without consuming real one-time reset tokens.
Login CTA https://dev.villume.com/reset-password UI action UI success CTA opens the login modal; no backend call required for this slicing acceptance.

Code Review

File Review Status
src/app/pages/reset-password/reset-password.component.html Success state provides visible confirmation content and login handoff CTA. Pass
src/app/pages/reset-password/reset-password.component.scss Success layout styles keep the content centered and stable across desktop/mobile light-dark captures. Pass
src/app/pages/reset-password/reset-password.component.ts passwordChanged state switches UI to success confirmation and openLogin() opens login modal. Pass
qa_testing/tests/e2e/authentication/issue_1651_password_reset_success_page_slicing.spec.ts Added objective slicing coverage for success layout, CTA handoff, removed signed-out copy, and mobile dark responsiveness. Pass
qa_testing/scripts/record-issue-1651-dev-flow.cjs Added evidence recorder for desktop/mobile light-dark screenshots and address-bar video. Pass

Type: Slicing (frontend build) · Epic: Password recovery

Restyle the existing reset-password set-new-password form to the auth-form system (no dedicated mockup — follow login/sign-up).

Scope: labels + autocomplete=new-password, password show/hide toggles, inline errors, match validation. Keep 6-char minimum.

Acceptance: form matches auth-form; validation + match preserved; on success routes to the Password Reset confirmation (wired separately).

Part of the Settings & Password-Recovery redesign (Frontend).
Refs: docs/brainstorm/05-06-2026/ui-setting-email-password/plan.md · brainstorming.md

Epic C — Privacy (/privacy-cookie-policy)

Wire Privacy content + TOC.

Scope

  • Source content from existing copy/i18n; attach scroll-spy directive; callout link.

Acceptance criteria

  • Real Privacy content renders; TOC scroll-spy + anchors work; translatable.

Testing scenario (QA)

  1. Scroll → TOC highlights current section; click → jumps.
  2. "Back to top" + "Contact us" work.
  3. Switch language → content translates (if localized).
